name: Prune Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a sponge using the yeast, 1 teaspoon sugar, 1 cup milk, and 2 cups flour. Beat until smooth.
2. Set in a warm place and allow to rise overnight or until light and bubbly.
3. In a separate bowl, cream together 1 cup sugar and butter.
4. Add eggs, salt, and milk to the sugar mixture. Mix well.
5. Add the yeast sponge to the sugar mixture and beat thoroughly.
6. Gradually add flour, a little at a time, until a dough that is soft enough to knead is formed.
7. Knead until smooth and cover with a damp cloth.
8. Set in a warm place to rise until doubled in bulk.
9. Turn onto a lightly floured board and shape into buns.
10. Place on an oiled baking sheet. Cover and let rise until tripled in bulk.
11. Make a hole in the center of each bun using a knife handle.
12. Fill with prune preserves or any sweetened fruit desired.
13. Bake immediately in a hot oven (450°F) for 15-20 minutes.
14. Sprinkle with powdered sugar before serving.
